home.pageTitle: Pokemon TCG Prices Across Hungarian Shops
home.pageSubtitle: Tracking {products} unique products across {offers} live shop listings.
home.productsSubtitle: Products newly in stock since the last update are marked with ✨ New.
home.newFilterEmpty: No matching new items in this update. The list is ready after the next scrape run.

tooltips.median: The middle price among all current offers.
tooltips.spread: Gap between the highest and lowest listed prices.
tooltips.delta: How much the best price differs from median (in %). Negative means better than median.

bento.metricOffers: Offers column = shops listing that product

product.metaDescription: Compare {product} prices across Hungarian shops. Lowest price {lowest} Ft from {offers} in-stock offers.
product.priceHistoryHint: Tracked automatically after each scrape run. More data appears over time.
product.historyPending: History will appear after a few scraper runs.

health.tooltipDetail: {prefix}: {age} min since last scrape · {inStock} in-stock rows / {total} rows total

footer.disclaimer: Prices & availability are set by merchants — always verify before buying.

seo.metaTitle: PokéDeals — Pokémon TCG prices in Hungary
seo.metaDescription: Compare in-stock Pokémon TCG booster boxes, ETBs, tins and booster packs across Hungarian webshops. Live prices in Ft, updated about every 30 minutes.
seo.keywords: pokemon cards hungary,pokemon tcg hungary,pokemon card prices hungary,pokemon booster box price,pokemon etb price,elite trainer box hungary,pokemon árak,pokémon kártya árak,pokemon webshop összehasonlítás
seo.introP1: PokéDeals compares live in-stock Pokémon TCG prices from Hungarian online shops so you can see the lowest price, median market price, and spread for sealed products in one place.
seo.introP2: Track booster boxes, Elite Trainer Boxes, tins, blisters, bundles and booster packs across multiple retailers — prices in forint (Ft), refreshed about every 30 minutes.
seo.faqQ1: Where can I compare Pokémon card prices in Hungary?
seo.faqA1: PokéDeals aggregates current in-stock offers from Hungarian Pokémon TCG webshops and shows the lowest price, median price and number of offers for each product.
seo.faqA2: The scraper targets fresh data about every 30 minutes. Always confirm the final price and stock on the shop's website before you buy.
seo.faqA3: We focus on sealed Pokémon TCG products that are in stock: booster boxes, ETBs, tins, blisters, bundles and booster packs.
seo.termsDescription: Terms of use and disclaimer for PokéDeals, a Pokémon TCG price comparison site for Hungary.
seo.privacyDescription: Privacy information for PokéDeals, including how listing data is stored and displayed.
